name: Ignacio Espinoza / Phorge Lab
research_areas: these questions will range from pure to applied science. you will interact

pi_survey.project_assignment: Initially PI-driven, then  as the student matures they can start their own projects
pi_survey.outcome_expectations: First-author publications are required for graduation, High-impact publications are strongly encouraged, Graduation timeline is flexible, 3 papers expected
pi_survey.student_qualities: Strong independent problem-solving ability, Proactively initiates ideas and projects, Strong technical or methodological skills
pi_survey.successful_student_description: Ability to work independently and intrinsical motivation
pi_survey.poor_fit_traits: Avoids asking questions or communicating issues, Low tolerance for uncertainty or failure
pi_survey.common_mismatch: Work pace / workload expectations, Communication style mismatch
pi_survey.lab_description_pitch: In our lab you will be researching questions at the intersection of molecular biology, data science, microbiology and synbio, these questions will range from pure to applied science. You will interact, learn, challenged and be challenged by like-minded people with similar interest. You will be expected to work on Pi-orignated projects and eventually develop your own. Work life balance is important and you can develop your own schedule as long as it involves safe use of the lab space. Attendance and regular presentation in lab meetings is expected.
pi_survey.interview_questions: Research experience and past projects, Motivation for pursuing a PhD, Fit with lab research direction, Problem-solving or critical thinking ability, Communication skills, Ability to work independently
